title: Board Finance Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger board finance foundations judgment so finance work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Board Finance Foundations is a leverage point inside finance. It supports the broader goal of cash flow, runway, margins, pricing, and unit economics.
coreConcepts: Board Finance Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good board finance foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Board Finance Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
